scripts:
create group ameritas-dam-admins
set properties on authorizable (ameritas-dam-admins)/profile
  set givenName to "Ameritas DAM Administrators"
end

set ACL for ameritas-dam-admins
  allow jcr:read,jcr:write,jcr:readAccessControl,jcr:modifyAccessControl on /
end

create group ameritas-dam-librarians
set properties on authorizable (ameritas-dam-librarians)/profile
  set givenName to "Ameritas DAM Librarians"
end

set ACL for ameritas-dam-librarians
  allow jcr:read,jcr:write on /content/dam/marketing
  allow jcr:read,jcr:write on /content/dam/brand-library
  allow jcr:read,jcr:write on /content/dam/archive
  allow jcr:read,jcr:write on /content/dam/express-uploads
end

create group ameritas-brand-editors
set properties on authorizable (ameritas-brand-editors)/profile
  set givenName to "Ameritas Brand Editors"
end

set ACL for ameritas-brand-editors
  allow jcr:read,jcr:write on /content/dam/brand-library
end

create group ameritas-marketing-editors
set properties on authorizable (ameritas-marketing-editors)/profile
  set givenName to "Ameritas Marketing Editors"
end

set ACL for ameritas-marketing-editors
  allow jcr:read,jcr:write on /content/dam/marketing
end

create group ameritas-content-hub-collaborators
set properties on authorizable (ameritas-content-hub-collaborators)/profile
  set givenName to "Ameritas Content Hub Collaborators"
end

set ACL for ameritas-content-hub-collaborators
  allow jcr:read,jcr:modifyProperties,jcr:addChildNodes on /content/dam/brand-library
  allow jcr:read,jcr:modifyProperties,jcr:addChildNodes on /content/dam/marketing
end

create group ameritas-content-consumers
set properties on authorizable (ameritas-content-consumers)/profile
  set givenName to "Ameritas Content Consumers"
end

set ACL for ameritas-content-consumers
  allow jcr:read on /content/dam/brand-library
  allow jcr:read on /content/dam/marketing
end

create group ameritas-workflow-notification-users
set properties on authorizable (ameritas-workflow-notification-users)/profile
  set givenName to "Ameritas Workflow Notification Users"
end

set ACL for ameritas-workflow-notification-users
  allow jcr:write on /content/dam
  allow jcr:write on /etc/workflow/models
end
